title: Van Nuys Criminal Defense Lawyer - Farris Law Firm
metaDescription: Experienced Van Nuys Criminal Defense Attorneys: Don’t face the justice system alone. The Farris Law Firm specializes in personalized, strategic defense in Van Nuys.
contentHtml:
In an instant, things can change. When you’re arrested for a crime, you need to contact a criminal defense lawyer immediately. You need to contact a committed legal professional – someone who understands the inner workings of the criminal justice system.

At the Farris Law Firm, we can serve as your legal advocate in Van Nuys or when you’re charged with a crime in the San Fernando Valley. Our experienced Van Nuys criminal defense lawyers defends and has defended clients from all backgrounds. Just give us a call at 818-861-0861, any time.

How a Van Nuys Criminal Defense Lawyer Can Help You

When you’re charged with a crime, having professional legal representation can make all the difference in your case. We will:

  • Protect your constitutional rights at every stage of the process
  • Keep your information and communications confidential
  • Provide an ethical and aggressive defense
  • Get charges dismissed when constitutional rights are violated, or evidence is lacking
  • Give you a personalized defense plan for your situation
  • Keep you informed and consistent throughout your case

Why Choose the Farris Law Firm for Your Criminal Defense?

Charles Farris and his wife Beatrice started the Farris Law Firm in 2024 with the goal of providing local, personalized service to clients who need criminal defense. We’ve become known for our legal support throughout the San Fernando Valley.

What Makes Us Different

  • We limit our caseload so each client gets the attention their case needs
  • We use strategy, not aggressive “attack dog” tactics that often backfire
  • We have relationships with prosecutors, court staff, and judges
  • We’re local, so we can better serve the Van Nuys community
  • Charles Farris is a member of the Los Angeles County Bar Association (LACBA) and the San Fernando Valley Bar Association. As an SFVBA panel member, Mr. Farris receives regular community referrals.

Our Van Nuys Location

We cover Van Nuys, as it is the central hub for our criminal defense services in the San Fernando Valley. We prefer to practice locally rather than spread ourselves thin across distant counties. This allows us to have intimate knowledge of:

  • Local court procedures and people
  • DA office practices
  • Local police protocols
  • Community resources for rehabilitation and support
  • Alternative sentencing options in our area

Van Nuys Crime Stats

Van Nuys has higher crime rates than the national norm. As a result, you are not alone in needing legal services. The total crime rate is 9 percent higher than other places in the U.S. Crime stats in 2108 recorded 2,310 property crimes and 515 violent crimes for every 100,000 people.

Initial Consultation

During your initial consultation, we’ll go over the following:

  • Case analysis and potential outcomes
  • Fines and penalties
  • Court costs and legal fees
  • Investigation costs and requirements
  • Expert witness testimony
  • Payment plans
  • Any restitution

Practice Areas

The Farris Law Firm handles criminal defense for:

DUI

  • First offense DUI
  • Second offense DUI
  • Felony DUI with injury
  • Commercial driver DUI

Property Crimes

  • Vandalism
  • Theft
  • Burglary
  • Property damage

Drug Offenses

  • Possession
  • Intent to distribute
  • Drug trafficking
  • Prescription drug violations
  • Drug manufacturing

Violent Crimes

  • Weapons
  • Assault and battery
  • Domestic violence
  • Criminal threats
  • Robbery

Other Practice Areas

  • Traffic tickets
  • Military/judicial diversion programs
  • Bench warrants – Failures to appear

What’s at Stake

Our clients face serious consequences that can affect every area of their lives, including:

  • Jail or prison time
  • Big fines
  • Professional license suspension or revocation
  • Immigration problems
  • Job problems
  • Housing restrictions
  • Strain on personal relationships
  • Long-term effects on future opportunities

How We Fight the Prosecution

The criminal justice system is intimidating, especially when facing aggressive prosecutors with unlimited resources. The Van Nuys DA’s office is known for being tough on crime and will pursue maximum penalties even for first-time offenders.

What most people don’t know is that prosecutors file maximum charges as a way to pressure defendants into taking plea deals. Without experienced representation, you may:

  • Take an unfair plea deal that’s not in your favor
  • Miss evidence suppression opportunities
  • Overlook the chance to have charges reduced or dismissed
  • Get penalties that are harsher than necessary
  • Not explore alternative sentencing options

We know how to:

  • Challenge evidence collection
  • Question witnesses
  • Find constitutional violations
  • Talk to prosecutors
  • Present to the court
  • Explore sentencing options
  • Protect yourself throughout the process

What to Do After You’ve Been Charged

Even if you’ve already been arrested or charged, there are important steps you can take to help your defense:

  • Be silent

Don’t talk to friends or family

Don’t post about it on social media

Don’t talk to the police without your defense attorney present

  • Document everything

Write down everything about your arrest and police interaction

Keep a log of events

Keep copies of all case documents

Start a case file to track everything

  • Preserve the evidence

Get and secure physical evidence

Get contact info for potential witnesses

Save related documents or records

Screenshot or save digital evidence

  • Follow the rules of the court

Attend all court dates

Follow all court orders

Meet all deadlines

Follow pretrial release conditions

  • Secure your online presence

Check privacy settings on social media

Don’t post about your case or related activities

Be careful about online communication

Consider temporarily shutting down social media

Find Our Main Office in Downtown Burbank

Convenient access – 300 North Third Street, Suite 116 in Burbank, CA 91502 – Close to the Griffith Observatory and the famous Hollywood Sign.

Contact a Top Van Nuys Criminal Defense Lawyer Now

If you find yourself facing criminal charges in Van Nuys, a criminal defense attorney at Farris Law Firm is ready to take your call. With our extensive knowledge of the local legal system and experience in handling criminal cases in Van Nuys, we can provide the guidance and support you need during this difficult time. Don’t let charges ruin your future. Call the Farris Law Firm at (818) 861-0861. We offer:

  • 24/7 for emergencies
  • Same day appointments
  • Free consultations
  • Spanish spoken (Se habla español)

Hiring a knowledgeable Van Nuys criminal defense attorney is your best choice. Make an appointment for a free case review.
